serverInfo.name: sap.mcp/cds_api_batch_srv
serverInfo.title: cds_api_batch_srv
serverInfo.description: MCP server for the cds_api_batch_srv service.

tools.name: get_metadata_cds_api_batch_srv
tools.title: get_metadata_cds_api_batch_srv
tools.description:
Get metadata of the OData service with optional filtering to reduce token consumption.
Returns the metadata in XML format, which can be used to discover available entities and their properties.
Call this endpoint every time before you call other tools to ensure understanding of the schema.
Based on the metadata, you can dynamically create an OData request.

Use filtering parameters to get specific metadata sections. Without parameters, this tool returns the complete XML metadata (which might be huge).
Only use the specified enum values for the filtering parameters.

tools.name: batch_for_cds_api_batch_srv
tools.title: batch_for_cds_api_batch_srv
tools.description: Execute multiple OData operations in a single batch request using the $batch endpoint. This allows you to combine multiple tool calls into one HTTP request, improving efficiency when performing multiple operations.

tools.name: list_batch_for_cds_api_batch_srv
tools.title: list_Batch_for_cds_api_batch_srv
tools.description: Retrieve a list of entities from the Batch collection in the cds_api_batch_srv service. Supports OData query options for filtering, sorting, ranking ($top), skipping ($skip), expanding related entities, counting, selecting specific properties. Only use attributes in the query options that are specified in the metadata. If the structure of the entity is not known, call get_metadata_cds_api_batch_srv tool first to get the metadata.

tools.name: create_batch_for_cds_api_batch_srv
tools.title: create_Batch_for_cds_api_batch_srv
tools.description: Create a new instance of the Batch EntitySet in the cds_api_batch_srv service. If the structure of the entity is not known, call get_metadata_cds_api_batch_srv tool first to get the metadata.

tools.name: update_batch_for_cds_api_batch_srv
tools.title: update_Batch_for_cds_api_batch_srv
tools.description: Update an entity in Batch EntitySet in the cds_api_batch_srv service. Provide the key properties to identify the entity and the properties to update in the request body. If the structure of the entity is not known, call get_metadata_cds_api_batch_srv tool first to get the metadata.

tools.name: get_batch_for_cds_api_batch_srv
tools.title: get_Batch_for_cds_api_batch_srv
tools.description: Retrieve a single entity by its key from the Batch collection in the cds_api_batch_srv service. Provide the key property value(s) to identify the specific entity to retrieve. Supports OData query options for selecting specific properties ($select), expanding related entities ($expand). If the structure of the entity is not known, call get_metadata_cds_api_batch_srv tool first to get the metadata.

tools.name: count_batch_for_cds_api_batch_srv
tools.title: count_Batch_for_cds_api_batch_srv
tools.description: Get the total count of entities in the Batch collection in the cds_api_batch_srv service. Supports OData $filter to count only entities matching specific criteria. Use this when you need to determine the total number of entities without retrieving the actual data. If you need to understand the available filter properties, call get_metadata_cds_api_batch_srv tool first to get the metadata.

tools.name: update_to_batch_in_batchcharc_for_cds_api_batch_srv
tools.title: update_to_Batch_in_BatchCharc_for_cds_api_batch_srv
tools.description: Update the BatchType entity navigated from BatchCharc via the 'to_Batch' navigation property (HTTP PATCH). Provide the parent key and the properties to update. If the structure is unknown, call get_metadata_cds_api_batch_srv tool first.
